criteriaResults.description: The left wall of the boss arena (col 65) must extend from row 0 down to at least row 13 as solid tiles, preventing the player from wall-jumping above the arena ceiling
criteriaResults.evidence: src/level.js line 220: _fill(65, 65, 0, 13, TILE_SOLID) fills col 65 rows 0 through 13 inclusive with TILE_SOLID. The _fill helper (line 137) iterates r from r1 to r2 inclusive and c from c1 to c2 inclusive. Previously this was _fill(65, 65, 5, 16, TILE_SOLID) which left rows 0-4 empty above the ceiling at row 5, allowing the player to wall-jump over. Now rows 0-13 are all solid, blocking any path above the ceiling.

criteriaResults.description: The boss arena has an open entry gap in the left wall at ground level (approximately rows 14-16) that funnels the player DOWN into the arena floor where the Elder Shroomba is
criteriaResults.evidence: Col 65 is filled SOLID at rows 0-13 (left wall, line 220) and row 5 (ceiling, line 223). The arena floor fills rows 17-19 (line 225: _fill(65, 84, 17, H-1, TILE_SOLID) where H=20). No _fill call covers col 65 at rows 14, 15, or 16, leaving them as TILE_EMPTY. This creates a 3-row-tall entry gap at ground level (below the ceiling at row 5, above the floor at row 17), funneling the player into the playable arena space where the Elder Shroomba spawns at row 13.

criteriaResults.description: The boss trigger wall-sealing code in states.js still seals the entry gap when the boss fight begins (fills empty tiles in col 65)
criteriaResults.evidence: src/states.js lines 380-385: wallCol = Math.floor(Level.bossArenaX / TILE_SIZE) = Math.floor(65 * TILE_SIZE / TILE_SIZE) = 65. The loop iterates r from 0 to Level.height - 3 - 1 = 16 (exclusive bound is Level.height - 3 = 17, so r goes 0..16). For each row where getTile(65, r) === TILE_EMPTY, it sets TILE_SOLID. The entry gap at rows 14-16 consists of TILE_EMPTY tiles, so they will all be filled with TILE_SOLID when the boss triggers, sealing the arena.

criteriaResults.description: The boss health bar (including the 'Elder Shroomba' label) hides when the player is outside the boss arena area
criteriaResults.evidence: src/hud.js line 57: condition changed from 'if (this.bossActive)' to 'if (this.bossActive && Player.x + Player.width >= Level.bossArenaX)'. The boss health bar (rendered by _renderBossHealthBar which includes the boss name label at line 261) only renders when the player's right edge is at or past Level.bossArenaX (65 * TILE_SIZE = col 65). If the player exits the arena (e.g., dies and respawns at spawnX = 2 * TILE_SIZE), the health bar disappears because the position check fails.

criteriaResults.description: The game still loads and runs without errors after changes
criteriaResults.evidence: Started http-server on port 8787. Playwright (headless Chromium) loaded http://localhost:8787/index.html. Canvas element found with expected 960x540 dimensions. No JavaScript console errors or page errors detected after 2-second observation window. Game renders correctly.

criteriaResults.description: The boss arena right wall and ceiling remain intact (unchanged)
criteriaResults.evidence: src/level.js line 221: _fill(84, 84, 0, 16, TILE_SOLID) fills right wall col 84 rows 0-16. Previously rows 5-16; now extended to rows 0-16. Rows 5-16 remain SOLID (superset). Ceiling at line 223: _fill(65, 84, 5, 5, TILE_SOLID) is unchanged from the previous version. Floor at line 225: _fill(65, 84, 17, H-1, TILE_SOLID) is unchanged. The right wall, ceiling, and floor are all intact.

holistic.notes: This is a targeted fix sprint modifying only 2 files with 3 changed lines. No design or originality impact -- scores carried forward from sprint-12 baseline.

summary: Fix sprint fix-002 correctly addresses both reported issues. (1) The boss arena left wall (col 65) now extends from row 0 to row 13, preventing wall-jump exploits above the ceiling, while leaving rows 14-16 open as a ground-level entry gap that funnels the player into the arena floor. The wall-sealing trigger in states.js correctly covers rows 0-16 and will seal this gap when the boss fight begins. (2) The HUD boss health bar now includes a player position check (Player.x + Player.width >= Level.bossArenaX), hiding the bar when the player is outside the arena. The right wall was also extended to row 0 for consistency. All 6 criteria pass. No regressions detected.
